mapper.select: SELECT pp.PLAN_ID AS planId, pp.PLANT_CD AS plantCd, p.PLANT_NM AS plantNm, pp.PLAN_NO AS planNo, pp.PLAN_DT AS planDt, pp.PLAN_TYPE AS planType, pp.ITEM_CD AS itemCd, i.ITEM_NM AS itemNm, pp.PLAN_QTY AS planQty, pp.PLAN_START_DT AS planStartDt, pp.PLAN_END_DT AS planEndDt, pp.PRIORITY AS priority, pp.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, pp.CUSTOMER_CD AS customerCd, pp.CUSTOMER_NM AS customerNm, pp.DELIVERY_DT AS deliveryDt, pp.PLAN_STATUS AS planStatus, pp.RESULT_QTY AS resultQty, pp.PLAN_RMK AS planRmk FROM PLN_PROD_PLAN pp JOIN MST_PLANT p ON p.PLANT_CD = pp.PLANT_CD LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM i ON i.ITEM_CD = pp.ITEM_CD WHERE pp.PLAN_ID = #{planId}
